title: Better Compass
description: Display a clean and comprehensive compass HUD instead of having to use the compass item or F3
body:
Better Compass

If you don't understand how to use minecraft's compass or if you can't find your way back after exploring the nether or after dying, this mod is for you! ## 🔎 Features - **Compass HUD**: Display a compass HUD so you don't have to read the compass item's. - **Vanilla +**: The compass hud can be set to only display when you have a compass in your hand or in your inventory. - **Automatic waypoints**: Show the direction of your last death and the one of the nether portal you went in to get to the nether. ## ⚙️ Configuration To edit the settings of the mod: - Use Mod Menu - Use commands `/BetterCompassConfig setting value` - Edit the config file in `.minecraft/config/better-compass.json` ## 📦 Modpack Feel free to add this mod in your modpacks.
